title: Confirmation of your event creation on %agenda%: %event%
body: Your event **%event%** has been created on the agenda **%agenda%** with the state **%state%**.
bodyText: Your event %event% has been created on the agenda %agenda% with the state %state%.
unsubscribe: Stop receiving confirmations of your event creations
memberUnsubscribe: Stop receiving confirmations of your event creations on this agenda
